message:
deps: bump zstd 0.13 -> 0.13.3

Patch bump within 0.13.x. The zstd crate wraps libzstd and 0.13.3 only
updates the vendored C sources to zstd 1.5.x upstream patches; the
decompression output for any well-formed zstd frame is byte-identical
(this is a hard guarantee of the zstd standard).

This dep is on the btrfs ZLIB/LZO/ZSTD decompression hot path
(ffs-core::lib.rs, ffs-mvcc::compression). Verified by running
`cargo test -p ffs-btrfs --lib` (163 passed / 0 failed).

Verification:
  - rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets: clean
  - rch exec -- cargo test -p ffs-btrfs --lib: 163 passed / 0 failed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -73,7 +73,7 @@ tracing = "0.1.44"
 tracing-subscriber = "0.3.23"
 xxhash-rust = { version = "0.8.15", features = ["xxh3"] }
 fuser = { version = "0.16.0", features = ["abi-7-31"] }
-zstd = "0.13"
+zstd = "0.13.3"
 brotli = "6.0"
 flate2 = "1.0"
 lzokay-native = "0.1"
